meta.changelog: Complete restructuring synced with DE: Fewer steps, more info per step, respectful exits, fast tracks

start.text: What can I do for you?
start.subtitle: Three minutes well spent. Or read on your own – no problem.

options.label: I need a website or shop
I just want to get in touch
I'd rather read on my own

neu-was.subtitle: Helps me ask the right questions.

website-budget.text: Quick reality check: A professional company website with accessibility (mandatory since 2025) and AI visibility starts at EUR 2,400. Below that I recommend site builders like Squarespace – they've come a long way.
website-budget.detail: What you get for EUR 2,400–4,800: 5–8 pages, responsive design, accessibility compliant, AI-readable, fast loading. What costs more: shop integration, multilingual, complex structures, custom features.

options.label: Works for me – tell me more

website-branche.subtitle: So I can show relevant references.

website-gross.text: Larger projects rarely fail because of technology. They fail because of coordination. Every department wants something different, nobody has the overview, and in the end the agency gets blamed.
website-gross.detail: What I do differently: One person who knows all the websites. No team with staff rotation. You explain yourself once, not on every call. I've been supporting an industrial client with exactly this setup since 2023 – sole technical responsibility.

shop-art.subtitle: Determines what the shop needs to do.

shop-b2c.text: Honest question upfront: Do you really need a custom shop? For standard products without special requirements, Shopify is often the better choice – faster to launch, less maintenance, you pay monthly instead of a large sum upfront.
shop-b2c.detail: WooCommerce makes sense for: custom processes, special pricing, integrations with your inventory system, or if you don't want to pay a monthly fee. Then the shop is yours. Most common mistake: going too complex too early.

shop-b2b.text: B2B shops are a different league. In B2C, one person buys one product. In B2B, a buyer orders 500 units, needs tiered pricing, a dealer portal, sometimes approval from a supervisor.
shop-b2b.detail: A B2B shop needs to be a tool for your sales team, not a pretty catalogue. No standard theme can do this. The shop is built around your sales processes, not the other way around. I've been supporting an industrial client with exactly this setup since 2023.

shop-budget.text: A custom WooCommerce shop starts at EUR 4,800. Below that it gets tight – not impossible, but you'll need to make compromises. Large catalogue (500+ products) or B2B features: from EUR 10,000.
shop-budget.detail: What's included: design, setup, payment provider, shipping logic, accessibility, product import (up to 100 products). What costs extra: integrations, complex pricing logic, dealer portal.

portal-was.subtitle: Portals and tools – my favourite territory.

portal-karriere.text: Honest question: Do you really need custom? JOIN, Personio, Recruitee can post jobs. Quick to launch, applicant management included.
portal-karriere.detail: Custom makes sense for: your own design, integration into your website, location filters, multilingual, onboarding processes. If none of these apply, standard is enough.

portal-intern.text: Another honest question: Project management? Asana, Notion. CRM? HubSpot, Pipedrive. Time tracking? Clockify. If a ready-made tool covers 80%, use the tool.
portal-intern.detail: Custom only makes sense when your data needs to flow between systems, or your users are customers rather than your team. Then we build something.

problem-was.subtitle: I'll tell you honestly if a repair is worth it.

problem-redesign.text: Not everything that looks old needs a relaunch. Three questions: 1. Does the site work on mobile? 2. Is the content still relevant? 3. Has your target audience changed?
problem-redesign.detail: If only one applies, a targeted update is often enough instead of a complete rebuild. A design update costs EUR 2,000–5,000, a complete relaunch EUR 5,000–15,000. Big difference.

problem-technik.subtitle: Helps me narrow down the problem.

betreuung-info.text: Quick overview: Basic (updates, backups, security) from EUR 15/month. Standard (plus changes) EUR 80–200/month. Premium (dedicated developer) EUR 400–800/month.
betreuung-info.detail: The difference: With Basic I react to problems. With Standard you call and I implement. With Premium I think ahead, suggest improvements, plan proactively. What do you need?

result-direkt.title: Direct line – works for me.
result-direkt.text: No funnel, no detours. Write to me about what you need. I respond within one business day. If it's urgent: call.

result-budget-klein.title: Under EUR 2,400 – I'll be honest with you.
result-budget-klein.text:
For this budget I can't deliver a professional website with accessibility and AI visibility. Not because I don't want to, but because there isn't enough time.

What I recommend: Squarespace or Jimdo. They've come a long way. If you can invest more later, get in touch. No pressure, no follow-up.

Or we talk briefly anyway – maybe there's a way I don't see.

result-industrie.title: Industry and trades – I know this space.
result-industrie.text:
I've been supporting Gerwing Steinwerke since 2023 – paving stones, B2B, complex product catalogues. Industrial clients don't need fancy animations. They need: fast loading times, clear product information, and a site that works on a tablet in the workshop.

Accessibility and AI visibility are built into every project. Typical effort: 40–80 hours, EUR 3,200–6,400.

result-beratung-branche.title: Consulting and services – trust is everything.
result-beratung-branche.text:
For consultants, the website decides whether someone calls or clicks away. What matters: showing competence without bragging. References you can verify. A process that provides certainty.

AI visibility is particularly important here – 73% of B2B buyers research with ChatGPT. If you don't show up there, you don't exist. Typical effort: 40–80 hours.

result-recht.title: Law, tax, finance – serious doesn't have to be boring.
result-recht.text:
Law firms and tax offices have a problem: all websites look the same. Stock photos of handshakes, paragraph symbols, 'We advise you competently'. That doesn't differentiate anyone.

What works: real photos, clear language, compliance tools that generate leads. Scheja & Partner has interactive GDPR checks – they bring inquiries. Typical effort: 50–100 hours.

proof.name: Scheja & Partner
proof.desc: Data protection law firm, interactive tools

result-sozial.title: Health, social, nonprofits – budgets are tight, I know.
result-sozial.text:
Practices, associations and social organisations rarely have big budgets. But they have something companies lack: real stories. People who were helped. Impact that matters.

Accessibility here is not just a requirement, but an attitude. Typical effort: 30–60 hours. For associations with demonstrably tight budgets, I'll discuss the price.

result-website.title: Three things good company websites in 2026 have in common.
result-website.text:
First: few pages, clear structure. Most need 5–8 pages, not 40. Second: the website must be readable for AI systems. 73% of B2B buyers research with ChatGPT. Third: accessibility has been mandatory since 2025, not optional.

Typical effort: 40–80 hours, EUR 3,200–6,400.

result-gross.title: Larger projects – one person instead of agency chaos.
result-gross.text:
What I do differently: I'm your only point of contact. No handovers, no rotation, no 'I'd have to check on that'. You explain yourself once, and I keep the overview – for years.

This is how I work with Gerwing Steinwerke: sole technical responsibility since 2023. Effort for corporate groups: 100–300 hours, depending on scope.

result-landingpage.title: Landing page – one page, one goal.
result-landingpage.text:
What a landing page needs: a clear CTA, no navigation menu leading away, no ten options. The most common mistakes: too much text, too many buttons, no clear next step.

Static HTML is almost always enough. Faster than WordPress, no maintenance. Typical effort: 15–30 hours, EUR 1,200–2,400.

cta.label: Send me the offer – I'll design the page

result-beratung.title: Not sure? Let's talk.
result-beratung.text:
You know you need something, but not exactly what. That's a good starting point – more honest than 'I want exactly this'. In a short conversation we'll figure out what fits your budget and goals.

15 minutes, no pitch, no obligation. I'll also tell you if a site builder is enough.

result-shop.title: WooCommerce – when standard isn't enough.
result-shop.text:
Custom processes, special pricing, integrations: that's what WooCommerce is built for. It's yours, no subscription, full control. I build it to fit your business, not some template.

Typical effort: 80–150 hours, EUR 6,400–12,000. Most common mistake: going too complex too early. Start with what you really need.

result-shop-standard.title: Shopify might be enough – and that's okay.
result-shop-standard.text:
No developer likes to say this, but: for standard products without special requirements, Shopify is often the better choice. Quick to launch, low maintenance. You pay monthly, but Shopify handles hosting and security.

If you need custom processes later, you'll have to migrate. But for the start it can be right. If you still want WooCommerce: 60–100 hours, from EUR 4,800.

result-shop-beratung.title: Shop consultation – understand first, then build.
result-shop-beratung.text:
You're not sure if Shopify is enough or it has to be WooCommerce? That's a good question. The answer depends on your processes, not the price.

In a short conversation we'll clarify: What do you sell? How many products? To whom? What special requirements? Then you'll know what you need.

result-shop-b2b.title: B2B shop – a tool for your sales team.
result-shop-b2b.text:
In B2B the shop has to work like your sales team thinks. Tiered pricing, dealer access, approval processes, discount logic. No template can do this – it has to be built.

I've been supporting an industrial client with exactly this setup since 2023: dealer portal, sample tracking, pricing logic. Typical effort: 100–200 hours, from EUR 8,000.

cta.label: Tell me about your B2B sales

result-shop-budget-klein.title: Shop under EUR 4,800 – possible, but with compromises.
result-shop-budget-klein.text:
Custom shop for under EUR 4,800 is tight. Not impossible, but: adapt a standard design instead of custom, you manage products yourself, no complex processes.

If that's enough – we can talk. If not: Shopify is more honest. No monthly developer fee, but monthly Shopify fee instead. Calculate what's cheaper.

result-shop-gross.title: Large catalogue – infrastructure matters.
result-shop-gross.text:
From 500 products you need more than a good theme. Shared hosting dies at this size. You need: managed hosting, staging for testing, clean product import, filters that stay fast at 1000 products.

Typical effort: 100–200 hours, from EUR 8,000. The import alone can take 20–40 hours – depending on how clean your data is.

result-portal-kunden.title: Customer portal – privacy from the start.
result-portal-kunden.text:
A login area for customers is technically more demanding because GDPR has to be built in from the start. What should customers see? Who manages access? How long is data stored?

This is doable and routine. Typical effort: 60–120 hours, GDPR concept included.

cta.label: What should customers be able to see?

result-portal-karriere.title: Career portal – custom makes sense for you.
result-portal-karriere.text:
Your own design, integration into your website, location filters, multilingual: no standard tool can do this. I built a career portal plus internal onboarding tool for Runden Group.

Typical effort: 60–120 hours, depending on integration depth.

result-portal-standard.title: Standard tool is enough – honestly.
result-portal-standard.text:
JOIN, Personio, Recruitee – they do this well. Quick to launch, applicant management included, no development costs. Custom wouldn't pay off for your needs.

My advice: Start with standard. If you later find it's not enough, we can still talk.

result-portal-custom.title: Custom tool – if it has to be, do it right.
result-portal-custom.text:
You've checked if ready-made tools are enough. The answer is no. Then we build something. This is the kind of project that interests me most.

Effort varies widely – from 40 hours for an interactive report to 200+ for a complex portal. Initial conversation clarifies the scope.

result-portal-tool.title: Ready-made tool – often the better choice.
result-portal-tool.text:
No developer likes to say this: If a ready-made tool covers 80%, custom is usually more expensive. Asana, Notion, HubSpot, Pipedrive – they work because thousands of companies use them.

If standard isn't enough later, we can talk. But don't start with custom if standard is enough.

result-bericht.title: Interactive report – right up my alley.
result-bericht.text:
Annual reports, impact reports, sustainability reports – as PDFs they gather dust. As interactive websites they get read, shared, linked.

I built an impact report with an interactive Germany map for Seniorpartner in School. Clear scope, clear end. Typical effort: 40–80 hours.

result-performance.title: Slow website – usually quick to fix.
result-performance.text:
The most common causes: images too large, too many plugins accumulated over the years, or cheap hosting. None of these is a big problem.

Send me the URL, I'll tell you in 5 minutes what's causing it. Typical effort: 5–15 hours, EUR 400–1,200.

result-bfsg.title: EAA/BFSG – mandatory since June 2025.
result-bfsg.text:
Fines up to EUR 100,000. 96% of all websites still have issues. The most common: text hard to read, site not keyboard-navigable, images without descriptions.

I'll check your website, tell you what needs to be done, and implement it. Typical effort: 10–30 hours.

result-seo.title: Visibility – Google AND AI.
result-seo.text:
Two different problems. Google: classic SEO, still works. AI: 73% of B2B buyers research with ChatGPT. If you don't show up there, you don't exist.

Quick test: Ask ChatGPT about your company. Is the answer correct? If not, you have a GEO problem – and classic SEO won't solve it.

result-redesign.title: Design update – not a complete relaunch.
result-redesign.text:
New theme, new typography, better imagery – without rebuilding everything from scratch. Saves time and money.

Typical effort: 30–60 hours, EUR 2,400–4,800. I'll look at what's there and honestly tell you what's worth it.

result-relaunch.title: Complete relaunch – how to plan it right.
result-relaunch.text:
When design, technology and content are all outdated, a fresh start makes sense. But not without a plan. Step 1: What must the new website DO (not: have). Step 2: What works from the old one (analytics). Step 3: Only then design and technology.

Typical effort: 60–120 hours, EUR 4,800–9,600.

result-redesign-beratung.title: Redesign or relaunch? Let's clarify.
result-redesign-beratung.text:
Not everything that looks old needs a rebuild. Sometimes a facelift is enough, sometimes more is needed. In 15 minutes we'll figure out what makes sense for you.

Send me the URL beforehand – then I'll be prepared.

result-technik-wp.title: WordPress problem – I know the system inside out.
result-technik-wp.text:
WordPress problems usually have to do with plugins conflicting. Or an update that broke something. This can be systematically narrowed down.

I worked for the makers of YOOtheme and maintain over 20 WordPress websites. Send me a description – initial assessment free.

result-technik-woo.title: WooCommerce problem – this is about money.
result-technik-woo.text:
When the shop has problems, it costs revenue directly. Orders don't go through, prices are wrong, payment provider reports errors. This is not something to experiment with.

Send me a description. Shops get priority.

result-technik.title: Something is broken – we'll figure it out.
result-technik.text:
If you don't know exactly what's wrong: no problem. Describe what's happening (or not happening), since when, on which page. The more precise, the faster I am.

Initial assessment free.

result-sicherheit.title: Hacked – act fast now.
result-sicherheit.text:
Don't try to fix it yourself. Inform your host and contact me. I'll find the vulnerability, clean up and secure it.

For security issues I respond the same day.

result-betreuung-basis.title: Basic maintenance – runs in the background.
result-betreuung-basis.text:
Updates, backups, security monitoring. I update manually, check afterwards, roll back if needed. You don't notice any of it – and that's exactly the point.

From EUR 15/month for a WordPress website.

result-betreuung-standard.title: Standard maintenance – you send, I implement.
result-betreuung-standard.text:
Everything from Basic, plus: you send an email with a change, I implement it. No explaining where things are every time. No re-learning the CMS every time. Short paths.

EUR 80–200/month, depending on change frequency.

result-betreuung-premium.title: Premium – your own developer, without fixed costs.
result-betreuung-premium.text:
Some don't need a maintenance contract, but their own developer. Just without social contributions and office costs. Premium means: I'm your dedicated contact for everything. Priority support, retainer, short paths.

EUR 400–800/month. This is how I work with Gerwing – sole technical responsibility since 2023.
